signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**

The SEC's decision to drop its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs has been confirmed and represents the most significant market-moving development in April 2026[1]. This regulatory resolution has fundamentally shifted market sentiment and removed a burden that weighted on XRP for half a decade[1].

signals.headline: XRP Breaks Above $1
signals.raw:
XRP Breaks Above $1.50 Resistance for First Time in 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP touched $1.51094 intraday on April 17, breaking decisively above the critical $1.50 resistance level for the first time since February[2]. While the token subsequently pulled back to consolidate around $1.42-$1.43, this breakout signals underlying technical strength[1][2].

signals.headline: Six Spot XRP ETFs Now Active in U
signals.raw:
Six Spot XRP ETFs Now Active in U.S. Market | YES | HIGH confidence**

By mid-April 2026, six active spot XRP ETFs have launched in the U.S. with combined assets of approximately $1 billion and around 787 million XRP locked in custody[2]. The first XRP ETF (XRPC) achieved the highest first-day AUM of any crypto ETF launch in 2025[2].
